basic_details.job_title: SRES-DID Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for District Programme Manager & Block Programme Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: State Rural Employment Society- District Implementing Division (SRES-DID)
basic_details.post_name: District Programme Manager (SBM-G) & Block Programme Assistant (SBM-G)
basic_details.short_information: State Rural Employment Society- District Implementing Division (SRES-DID) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 2 District Programme Manager (SBM-G) & Block Programme Assistant (SBM-G) Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.age_details: Relaxation in age shall be given as per government of India norms.
age_limit.details: All Posts: Age relaxation shall be given as per government of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Master Degree in any discipline for District Programme Manager and Bachelor Degree in any discipline with computer skills (MS Office) for Block Programme Assistant.
qualification.details: District Programme Manager (SBM-G): Master Degree in any discipline with a maximum of 4 years of work experience in Rural Development or related fields. Block Programme Assistant (SBM-G): Bachelor Degree in any discipline and must possess computer skills (MS Office) with 2 years or more experience in IEC sector/in the field of knowledge in Govt sponsored programme.

salary_details.details: District Programme Manager (SBM-G): Rs.25,000/- Block Programme Assistant (SBM-G): Rs.15,000/-

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for SRES-DID Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website:eastjaintiahills.gov.in/ .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SRES-DID Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the SRES-DID Recruitment 2026 is 29th May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the SRES-DID Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the SRES-DID Recruitment 2026. These vacancies are for the posts of District Programme Manager (SBM-G) and Block Programme Assistant (SBM-G).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for District Programme Manager (SBM-G)?
faq.answer: For the post of District Programme Manager (SBM-G), candidates must possess a Master Degree in any discipline. Additionally, a maximum of 4 years of work experience in Rural Development or related fields is required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for Block Programme Assistant (SBM-G)?
faq.answer: For the post of Block Programme Assistant (SBM-G), candidates need a Bachelor Degree in any discipline along with computer skills (MS Office). A minimum of 2 years of experience in the IEC sector or in government-sponsored programs is also necessary.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the District Programme Manager post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the post of District Programme Manager (SBM-G) will receive a salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Block Programme Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the post of Block Programme Assistant (SBM-G) will receive a salary of Rs. 15,000/- per month. This is also a contractual position.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for the SRES-DID Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The notification states that relaxation in age shall be given as per government of India norms. Specific minimum and maximum age limits are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the SRES-DID Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it to the specified address.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the SRES-DID Recruitment 2026 will involve a Written Test followed by a Personal Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages to be considered for the posts.

faq.question: Q10. Where should I submit the filled application form?
faq.answer: The completed application form, along with all necessary documents, should be submitted to the Office of the Swacch Bharat Mission (G), East Jaintia Hills District Khlichriat by the last date of application.
